title: sambucus loureiroana
intro: Sambucus loureiroana, also known as Chinese elder or Loureiro's elder, is a plant species in the genus Sambucus, belonging to the family Adoxaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Sambucus loureiroana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, as well as its antiviral and antibacterial properties. Sambucus loureiroana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
